message:
feat(hook): implement dynamic daemon timeout with queue-aware behavior

- Add configurable timeout via RCH_DAEMON_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS (default
  30s for non-queued) and RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS (default
  330s for queued builds) to prevent client/server timeout misalignment
- Extract daemon_response_timeout_for(), parse_timeout_secs(), and
  queue_when_busy_enabled_from() helpers for testable timeout computation
- Pass wait_timeout_secs in daemon query payload when queuing is enabled
  so daemon can align its own timeout ceiling with the client
- Update status command output and server-side API response handling
  for new timeout/queue semantics
- Update E2E tests and reliability coverage matrix to exercise
  queue-aware timeout paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
